task: CI Quality Gate Telegram Approval Wiring

step_1_findings.detail: Identified webhook_apex() in /home/agentuser/api_bridge/app.py as Telegram message handler

step_2_pending_gate_file.detail: Pending gate file /tmp/ci_gate_pending.json written before wait_for_approval()

step_3_cleanup.detail: Pending gate file cleaned up after PROCEED, ABORT, or timeout

step_4_handler_function.detail: handle_ci_gate_response() function implemented with full gate response logic

step_5_wired_into_webhook.detail: Handler called FIRST in webhook_apex() before command routing

step_6_proceed_confirmation.detail: PROCEED sends: '✅ Approved — generating CI report for {client_name}...'

step_7_abort_confirmation.detail: ABORT sends: '❌ Aborted — CI job for {client_name} cancelled.'

additions: Added gate handler call as first check
Pending gate file write before wait_for_approval() (9 lines)

workflow.description: CI Agent → Gate opens → Write pending file → Send Telegram assessment → Wait for PROCEED/ABORT → Webhook receives message → handle_ci_gate_response() writes response file → wait_for_approval() reads it → Job continues/aborts → Cleanup
